COURT TRIAL ON APR-28-2003 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED. PLAINTIFF APPEARED THROUGH COUNSEL. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. WITNESS AFFIRMED AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EXHIBITS MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION, MOVED, AND RECEIVED IN EVIDENCE. THE COURT ENTERED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF 380 EDDY STREET, UNIT 334. THE JUDGMENT WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HONORABLE JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTING BY ERIC THRONE, CSR #7855 (GPS)

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. PTJ: Irving Pfeffer, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Valerie Papale. John P. Zanghi, Esq. represented Caritas Management Corp. and there being no appearance by Defendant, Kenneth Goff, the request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
